title: Guidance for Developing local Get Britain Working plans (England)
body: "This guidance covers:   the strategic context and the challenges that local Get Britain Working plans will help address the aims and objectives of the plans, including how they will identify local challenges, ensure collective agreement of actions needed to remedy these issues, and how they monitor progress of local challenges with relevant outcome indicators  who should be involved in the creation of the plans, and over what geographies how areas should develop their plans, and the timeframes for this what content the plans should cover the relationship to other local plans and strategies the funding and support that DWP will provide areas to develop their plans   For further information, you can contact us via gbw.plans@dwp.gov.uk.  "
